---
title: "Yizhen Shi"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: bella.png
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:yis102@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yizhen-shi-aab405382/
    - icon: file-earmark-text
      text: Resume
      href: resume.pdf
---

Hi, I'm **Yizhen Shi**, an **MSBA student at UC San Diego** focused on **marketing analytics** and **data-driven decision making**.

## Current

- Master of Science in Business Analytics, **UC San Diego Rady School of Management**
- Data Analytics Consultant, **Feedback Loop (EduSourced)**
- Data Engineering Intern, **Checkit Analytics**

## Interests

- Data Analysis
- Customer Segmentation
- Machine Learning
- Customer Analytics
- Predictive Modeling

## Work Experience

### Feedback Loop (EduSourced) | 2026–Present
- Analyze survey and usage data to uncover user engagement patterns and improve product adoption.
- Develop engagement metrics and segment users into cohorts to identify at-risk users.
- Build interactive dashboards to support marketing and customer success decision-making.

### Checkit Analytics | 2026–Present
- Build and maintain Python-based data pipelines for FDA drug approvals and clinical pipeline data.
- Design relational database schemas in PostgreSQL and perform SQL-based data quality checks.
- Improve pipeline reliability with anomaly detection and consistency checks.

### Equity Methods | 2026
- Built multi-scenario Excel models for stock-based compensation tax impacts.
- Analyzed grant and exercise datasets in SAS for SEC Pay Versus Performance reporting.
- Developed PVP proxy tables and graphical disclosure outputs.

## Projects

### Customer Churn Prediction
- Built Logistic Regression and Random Forest models to predict churn.
- Applied SHAP, permutation importance, and PDP for interpretation.
- Quantified retention strategy impact through targeting and CLV analysis.

### SQL & ETL Project
- Built an automated ETL/ELT pipeline in Snowflake using Python and SQL.
- Integrated CSV, XML, Postgres, and Snowflake Marketplace data sources.
- Reduced manual setup time by 90% with reproducible automation scripts.

## Education

- **M.S. in Business Analytics**, UC San Diego, expected **Dec 2026**
- **B.S. in Finance**, Arizona State University, **May 2025**, GPA **3.81**

## Skills

- **Programming:** Python, SQL, R, SAS
- **Analytics:** Scikit-learn, NLP, Deep Learning, Tableau
- **Tools:** Excel, Git, Docker, AWS EC2
- **AI/ML Systems:** OpenAI, Gemini, RAG
